_source: synthesized — Huntress incident report envelope + payload

payload.subject: Suspicious PowerShell activity on LAPTOP-CFO-01
payload.summary: A threat actor appears to have executed an obfuscated PowerShell command that downloaded and ran a secondary payload. The process chain was: winword.exe → cmd.exe → powershell.exe -encoded <...>.
remediations: Collect RAM image + disk image for forensics
Reset credentials for user on this device
Scan other endpoints for the sha256 indicator above
